justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for a two-hour investing session on a Thursday afternoon and accurately queried for availability within those parameters.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant `check_availability` calls for each Thursday in June, instead of consolidating them into a single, broader query for the entire month.

overall_notes: The agent successfully explained the limitations of the system regarding continuous two-hour slots versus back-to-back one-hour slots, which was a complex user query.
